advisory.checklist_item: - [ ] Add a test that exercises the absent-[agents]-stack degrade: monkeypatch the pydantic_ai/httpx import (or run a core-only subprocess) and assert classify_llm_failure(<rebar-typed/stdlib error>) returns NEEDS_INVESTIGATION (retryable=False) without raising.
evidence: src/rebar/llm/failure.py:188-193 new arm in `_base_diagnostic`: `except ImportError:` ... `return diag`
tests/unit/test_llm_failure_classifier.py:15 `pytest.importorskip("pydantic_ai")` — the whole classifier module SKIPS when the extra is absent, so the absent-stack degrade path is never entered

ABSENCE: no test monkeypatches the pydantic_ai/httpx import to ImportError, and no subprocess/core-only test asserts `classify_llm_failure(<rebar-typed error>)` returns NEEDS_INVESTIGATION without raising — searched test_llm_failure_matrix.py (no ImportError match) and test_llm_disposition_plumbing.py (no failure/classify_llm_failure match)
advisory.finding: The new absent-[agents]-stack degrade behavior — classify_llm_failure() returning NEEDS_INVESTIGATION instead of raising ModuleNotFoundError when pydantic_ai/httpx are missing — has no test. All classifier tests `pytest.importorskip("pydantic_ai")`, so they skip in a core-only env and never exercise the new `except ImportError` arms in `_map`/`_base_diagnostic`; in an extras-installed CI env those arms never execute either. A regression that let the import error propagate (the exact failure the commit says reached `main` via runner.preflight) would not be caught.
scenarios: A future refactor removes or narrows the try/except and ModuleNotFoundError again propagates through classify_llm_failure in a no-extras core install
runner.preflight classifying a missing-extra LLMConfigError under a core wheel
advisory.suggested_fix: In test_llm_failure_classifier.py add a test (not guarded by importorskip) that forces the ImportError branch, e.g. monkeypatch `builtins.__import__` (or sys.modules) so `import pydantic_ai.exceptions`/`import httpx` raise ImportError, then assert `classify_llm_failure(RuntimeError('x')).resolution_class is ResolutionClass.NEEDS_INVESTIGATION` and that no exception propagates; optionally also assert `_base_diagnostic` returns the unenriched diag.
